seed_instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area.
org_constraint: The second sentence must include the keyword "cozy."
new_constraint: Use the word "comfortable" in place of "cozy" in your review.
instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. The second sentence must include the keyword "cozy." Use the word "comfortable" in place of "cozy" in your review.
response: The newly opened coffee shop on Main Street has quickly become a favorite spot for locals seeking a quiet place to work or relax. The interior is incredibly comfortable, featuring plush armchairs and warm lighting that create the perfect atmosphere for a long morning brew. The baristas are friendly and knowledgeable, ensuring that every cup is crafted with care. Whether you need a quick caffeine fix or a place to catch up on emails, this shop delivers an exceptional experience.
